## Contribution type

- [ ] Suite B Draft submission
- [ ] Community Submitted review record
- [ ] Other benchmark or tooling change

## Suite B submission checklist

- [ ] The submission was generated by the Benchmark App and was not manually edited.
- [ ] The filename equals `<submissionID>.json`.
- [ ] I reviewed the public device, model, runtime, and evidence fields.
- [ ] The submission contains no personal data.
- [ ] I understand structural validation does not grant Verified status or default leaderboard placement.

## Maintainer review checklist

- [ ] CI structural validation passed.
- [ ] Any Community Submitted record was generated by the promotion tool.
- [ ] No Reproduced, Verified, Maintainer Reference, or leaderboard status was assigned automatically.
